text.title: HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid/invalid examples + forbidden patterns for hipaa-baa-vendor-checklist output.

example.note: required fields missing (evidence, consumer, owner, last_touched); rules_applied empty; invalid artefact_id form.

list.item: artefact produced without any evidence entry referencing a rule_id
consumer field empty or set to generic 'team' / 'everyone'
rules_applied references rule ids not present in content/01-core-rules.xml
LLM-generated evidence citing 'industry standard' without a named source
applies_if guard failed AND artefact still produced (must be a skip with reason)
